scripts.build: pnpm --filter @share-stock-god/shared build && pnpm --filter @share-stock-god/server build && pnpm --filter @share-stock-god/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @share-stock-god/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @share-stock-god/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @share-stock-god/web typecheck
